race.comment: GRAMMAR LAD (4) was lining up for the hat trick last start over this distance at Eagle Farm but although competitive in the BM85 was safely held in third. Drops in grade so a return to the winner's list looks on the cards. OCTOBER (5) is a five-time winner over this evening's trip. Scored impressively over the mile at Eagle Farm last time and obviously won't have an issue coming back 200m. Worth a small investment at nice odds. BLITZBURG (7) ran a couple of very nice races at this track in April, albeit both at 1200m. Hasn't won for a long while but might need the 1400m now so keep him safe. MORE LOVE (17) has her hoof firmly on the till with a couple of near misses recently, the latest over 1350m at Ipswich. Has a fine record here at the trip and can build on that this evening. HEAVENLY IMPACT (10) has been freshened up since winning a Class 3 here at this distance seven weeks ago. In the mix despite the gap between runs.
